subject: Add OOM chart for SDNC ansible server pod
commit_message:
Add OOM chart for SDNC ansible server pod

Change-Id: I0b62374a635b3f64c4d15b74eca8924c86082e92
Signed-off-by: jmac <james.macnider@amdocs.com>
Issue-ID: SDNC-312

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Tested in OpenLab with 3 ODLs, code applied on commit 87b247f52fcd121e69bddfa68ddda60e39eb18c8 (Fri May 11 14:31:20 2018 +0000). I had to include both sdc and message-router due to a known issue with dmaap-listener and ueb pods are not coming up.  I confirmed ansible server and other SDNC pods are up and running.
